name: Patience St. Pim
description:
(Create your own scenario)

The ice elemental from adventure time

(Dawg nobody using this shi 💀)

I genuinely don't know what to say, she looks like my type of character, but apparently the A.T community doesn't exactly like her, i haven't seen anyone say they're their number one fan, but i have seen someone say they hate her because she's annoying

So if you're and adventure time fan, let me know what you think about her, because for me she's a certified gyatt. Again, I haven't watched adventure time, it never attracted my attention, but I'll probably check it out some time

If the bot feels a little yanky is because i included everything from the wiki, with minor changes. So if you want to you can make a better one, which frankly you should have done in the first place if you could (mind you that this account was conceived with the entire idea of rage bait in mind)
